structured_content.text: Announcing a personal day and two recent Stratechery Plus podcasts on Facebook.

View in browser Personal Day, and Two Podcasts on Facebook Tuesday, August 1, 2023 Listen to this Update in your podcast player Good morning, It’s nearing the end of summer, which both means that my personal schedule is becoming cramped, while tech news slows to a crawl; I’m going to take a personal day today, and also plan to take one next week, before ramping back up to a normal four days-a-week schedule. There is, though, other content in the Stratechery Plus bundle, covering two recent stories about Facebook: First, on Monday’s Sharp Tech , Andrew and I discussed the revelations that Facebook made moderation decisions in response to White House pressure during COVID. Second, on this morning’s Dithering , John and I discussed those recently released studies that, to a certain extent, exonerate the Facebook algorithm from responsibility for the current state of our politics. I think both of these topics benefit from the podcast format, and I encourage you to check them out if they are not yet in your regular rotation. You can add both podcasts to your podcast player using the links at the bottom of this email. Thanks, and I’ll be back on Wednesday morning. Ben This Update will be available as a podcast later today. To receive it in your podcast player, visit Stratechery . The Stratechery Update is intended for a single recipient, but occasional forwarding is totally fine! If you would like to order multiple subscriptions for your team with a group discount (minimum 5), please contact me directly. Thanks for being a subscriber, and have a great day!
